signals.question: Has the candidate built and deployed embeddings-based retrieval systems to real users?
Has the candidate worked with vector databases or hybrid search infrastructure in a production environment?
Has the candidate designed evaluation frameworks for ranking systems, including metrics like NDCG or A/B testing?
Has the candidate shipped an end-to-end ranking, search, or recommendation system at meaningful scale?
Has the candidate spent a significant portion of their career in early-stage startups rather than large tech companies or consulting firms?
Has the candidate written production code in the last 18 months?

red_flag_patterns: career spent entirely in research environments without production deployment
recent experience limited to using frameworks like LangChain for simple tasks
career trajectory focused on title optimization with frequent job changes
entire career in consulting firms without product company experience
primary expertise in domains like computer vision or robotics without NLP/IR exposure
preferred_company_types: technology companies with a focus on product development
